title: Enphase Energy Q1 2026 Earnings: Key Points and Guidance
text: Enphase Energy reported Q1 2026 revenue of $282.9 million (including $34.5M safe harbor revenue) with non-GAAP gross margin of 43.9%. Non-GAAP operating income was $47.3 million and free cash flow was $83 million. Cash position reached $930.6 million after paying off $632.5M convertible notes. The company shipped 1.41 million microinverters and 103.1 megawatt-hours of batteries with U.S./International revenue mix of 83%/17%. U.S. sell-through declined 48% sequentially and 18% year-over-year, while commercial microinverter sales more than doubled sequentially. For Q2 2026 guidance, the company expects revenue of $280-$310 million (including $85M safe harbor) with battery shipments of 100-110 megawatt-hours and non-GAAP gross margin of 44-47%. Management acknowledged Q1 and Q2 sell-through expectations are roughly 10% to 15% below prior view, primarily due to unfavorable weather and TPO financing challenges. The PROPEL prepaid lease program expanded to 200+ installers with 200 originations/week and 84% battery attach.
